description: Third official curated-politics scenario for the 1936-01-01 start date. Interwar ownership with elevated Europe / East Asia theaters, contested areas (Rhineland story, Sudeten claims, Danzig corridor, Ethiopian invasion), and colonial/mandate politics as curated tables. Geometry remains the modern Natural Earth scaffold unless paired with a period-geometry pack (see multi-era packs). Recommended profile hoi-like. Not Paradox-grade completeness.
label: Official 1936 (HOI-leaning curated politics)
notes: Historical ownership is a curated overlay; province geometry is unchanged.
Assignment precedence: baseline ← country_rules ← region_rules ← province_overrides.
Sea provinces are excluded from ownership tables.
